SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE HUSING. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH ALOUF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FERTILITY GUIDANCE TECHNOLOGIES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CAROL LYNN CURCHOE BURTON, CEO. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT CAROL LYNN CURCHOE BURTON IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT KIMBAL POMEROY IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON DEFENDANT KIMBAL POMEROY TO PROCEED WITH THE CASE. THE COURT GRANTS THAT REQUEST. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
